stages.concept:
# Unit 079: 접속사 and, but, or, so - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **등위접속사 and, but, or, so**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 등위접속사는 **같은 문법적 단위(단어, 구, 절)**를 연결해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **and** — 그리고, ~와

> I like apples **and** oranges.
> 나는 사과와 오렌지를 좋아한다.

> She studied hard, **and** she passed the exam.
> 그녀는 열심히 공부했고, 시험에 합격했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **but** — 그러나, 하지만

> He is poor **but** happy.
> 그는 가난하지만 행복하다.

> I tried hard, **but** I failed.
> 나는 열심히 노력했지만 실패했다.

**Q. 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르세요.**
"He is young, (       ) he is very smart." (그는 어리지만 매우 똑똑하다.)
1. and
2. but ✅
3. so

👩‍🏫 선생님: **or** — 또는, 혹은

> Do you want tea **or** coffee?
> 차를 원하니 아니면 커피를 원하니?

> Hurry up, **or** you will be late.
> 서둘러라, 그렇지 않으면 늦을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **so** — 그래서

> It was raining, **so** I took an umbrella.
> 비가 오고 있었다, 그래서 나는 우산을 가져갔다.

> She was tired, **so** she went to bed early.
> 그녀는 피곤해서 일찍 잠자리에 들었다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: and(그리고), but(그러나), or(또는), so(그래서)! 기본 접속사 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 079: 접속사 and, but, or, so - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 and, but, or, so 중 알맞은 것을 골라 쓰시오.
Tom과 나는 가장 친한 친구이다.
Tom (     ) I are best friends.
> **정답** and

---

**02.** 그녀는 피곤했지만 공부를 계속했다.
She was tired, (     ) she kept studying.
> **정답** but

---

**03.** 커피를 마실래, 주스를 마실래?
Do you want coffee (     ) juice?
> **정답** or

---

**04.** 비가 왔다, 그래서 나는 집에 있었다.
It rained, (     ) I stayed home.
> **정답** so

---

**05.** 그는 키가 크고 잘생겼다.
He is tall (     ) handsome.
> **정답** and

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is smart or kind.
("그녀는 똑똑하고 친절하다")
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** or → and

---

**07.** I studied hard, and I failed the test.
(역접)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → but

---

**08.** Do you want tea but coffee?
(선택)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** but → or

---

**09.** He was sick, but he went to the hospital.
(결과)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** but → so

---

**10.** I like dogs so cats.
(나열)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** so → and

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
서둘러라, 안 그러면 늦을 것이다.
Hurry up, you will be late.
> **정답** or

---

**12.** 그는 가난하지만 행복하다.
He is poor happy.
> **정답** but

---

**13.** 나는 배가 고팠다, 그래서 빵을 먹었다.
I was hungry, I ate bread.
> **정답** so

---

**14.** 그녀는 노래를 부르고 춤을 춘다.
She sings dances.
> **정답** and

---

**15.** 지금 출발해, 안 그러면 버스를 놓칠 거야.
Leave now, you will miss the bus.
> **정답** or

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 사과와 바나나를 좋아한다.
like I apples and bananas
> **정답** I / like / apples / and / bananas

---

**17.** 그는 아팠지만 학교에 갔다.
was He sick but he went to school
> **정답** He / was / sick / but / he / went / to / school

---

**18.** 빨간색이 좋아, 파란색이 좋아?
Do like you red or blue
> **정답** Do / you / like / red / or / blue

---

**19.** 날씨가 좋았다, 그래서 우리는 소풍을 갔다.
The weather was nice so we went on a picnic
> **정답** The / weather / was / nice / so / we / went / on / a / picnic

---

**20.** 열심히 공부해라, 안 그러면 시험에 떨어질 거야.
Study hard or you will fail the test
> **정답** Study / hard / or / you / will / fail / the / test
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 079: 접속사 and, but, or, so - 연습문제 B

**01.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
그녀의 가족과 나는 오늘 처음 만났다.
Her family _______ I met for the first time today.
or
and
but
so
> **정답** and

---

**02.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
너는 후식으로 커피나 녹차를 선택할 수 있다.
You can choose coffee _______ green tea for dessert.
and
so
but
or
> **정답** or

---

**03.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
She is beautifully and wise.
They and I are in the same class.
Amy took a shower and fall asleep.
It was hot, but he kept exercising.
> **정답** Amy took a shower and fall asleep., She is
beautifully and wise.

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
It was hot, so I took off my jacket.
I like sweet food, but he doesn't.
His hobby is playing soccer and draw pictures.
He will clean the room or wash the dishes.
> **정답** His hobby is playing soccer and draw pictures.

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He caught a cold, _______ he wore a mask.
She was sad _______ didn't cry.
and - so
so - and
so - but
but - so
> **정답** so - but

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The girl is young _______ wise.
We serve bread _______ soup as an appetizer.
so - or
or - but
but - or
or - so
> **정답** but - or

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
It was hot, _______ I took off my jacket.
They raise a bird _______ a puppy.
and - but
or - but
so - and
so - but
> **정답** so - and

---

**08.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
그는 열심히 공부했다, 그래서 원하는 대학에 들어갔다.
He studied hard, _______ he entered a good
university.
so
but
or
and
> **정답** so

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 해외여행을 가고 싶었지만 갈 수 없었다.
Amy wanted to travel abroad, _______ she couldn't.
and
so
but
or
> **정답** but

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오. (2개)
She was sick, so she went to the hospital.
They had a hard time, but they kept running.
He is rich but unhappily.
He will go to college or got a job.
> **정답** She was sick, so she went to the hospital., They had
a hard time, but they kept running.

---

**11.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Are Amy _______ you in the same grade?
B: Yes, we are.
but
so
and
or
> **정답** and

---

**12.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Is the teacher Chinese _______ Japanese?
B: He is Japanese.
so
or
but
and
> **정답** or

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He was interested in history, _______ he majored in
history.
I ate bread _______ butter in the morning.
but - and
or - and
so - and
and - but
> **정답** so - and

---

**14.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I am good at swimming and dancing.
He looks young, so he is old.
She was wise, but made many mistakes.
He had a stomachache, so he couldn't go to
school.
> **정답** He looks young, so he is old.

---

**15.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I like both dogs or cats.
Is he a dancer or a singer?
He tried to solve the problem but failed to
solve it.
I'm sick and tired.
> **정답** I like both dogs or cats.

---

**16.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I like New York, and I don't want to live there.
Amy was sad and cried.
Tom lives in a big house but has no money.
The milk went bad, so it smelled strange.
> **정답** I like New York, and I don't want to live there.

---

**17.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Amy didn't eat breakfast, so she was
hungry.
We went to the library, so it was closed.
Tom or she can do this job.
Amy is good at math, English, and P.E.
> **정답** We went to the library, so it was closed.

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 but, or, so 중 알맞은 접속사를 골라
쓰시오.
그는 목이 아파서, 말을 할 수 없었다.
He had a sore throat, he couldn't speak
well.
> **정답** so

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 and, but, or 중 알맞은 접속사를 골라
쓰시오.
오늘은 흐리고 바람이 분다.
It's cloudy windy today.
> **정답** and

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 and, but, or 중 알맞은 접속사를 골라
쓰시오.
Amy는 매운 음식을 좋아하지만, 나는 그것을 좋아하지 않
는다.
Amy likes spicy food, I don't like it.
> **정답** but
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 079 접속사 and, but, or, so중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 빈칸에 주어진 접속사 중 알맞은 것을 골라 써 넣으시오.
and, but, or
Toma is good at riding a bike,  (     )  I am not.
정답 but

---

**02.** 빈칸에 주어진 접속사 중 알맞은 것을 골라 써 넣으시오.
and, but, or
I bought some meat  (     )  vegetables.
정답 and

---

**03.** 빈칸에 주어진 접속사 중 알맞은 것을 골라 써 넣으시오.
but, or, so
He had an online class,  (     )  he turned on the
computer.
정답 so

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장을 and, but, or 중 하나를 사용하여 한
문장으로 만드시오.
I got up early.
I was late for school.
I got up early,  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 but, I, was, late, for, school

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 but, or, so 중 하나를 사용하여 한
문장으로 만드시오.
He was hungry at night.
He ordered a late night snack.
He was hungry at night,  (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• late night snack 야식
정답 so, he, ordered, a, late, night, snack

---

**06.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사와 괄호 안의
말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
시험이 끝나서 나는 내 친구들과 놀 수 있다.
힌트 (     ) can play with
The exam is over,  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 so, I, can, play, with, my, friends

---

**07.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사와 괄호 안의
말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우리는 점심을 먹고 자전거를 탔다.
힌트 (     ) ride a bike
We ate lunch  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 and, rode, a, bike

---

**08.** 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 알맞은 접속사와 괄호 안의
말을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
개와 고양이 중 어느 것을 더 좋아하니?
힌트 (     ) cats, dogs
Which do you like better,  (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 dogs (cats), or, cats (dogs)

---

**09.** 다음 대화문에 알맞은 접속사를 보기에서 골라 써
넣으시오.
and, but, or
A: Will you come to my house after school?
B: Sorry, I want to go,  (     )  I can't.
정답 but

---

**10.** 다음 대화문에 알맞은 접속사를 보기에서 골라 써
넣으시오.
but, or, so
A: Do you want to read a book  (     )  watch TV?
B: I want to read a book.
정답 or

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 079: 접속사 and, but, or, so - 변형문제

**01.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
그의 가족과 나는 오늘 처음 만났다.
His family _______ I met for the first time today. or and but so
> 정답: and

---

**02.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
너는 후식으로 케이크나 과일을 선택할 수 있다.
You can choose cake _______ fruit for dessert. and so but or
> 정답: or

---

**03.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) She is beautifully and wise.
They and I are in the same club.
Tom took a bath and fall asleep.
It was cold, but he kept running.
> 정답: Tom took a bath and fall asleep., She is

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
It was cold, so I put on my coat.
I like sweet food, but she doesn't.
His hobby is playing basketball and draw pictures.
He will clean the room or wash the dishes.
> 정답: His hobby is playing basketball and draw pictures.

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He caught a cold, _______ he wore a scarf.
She was sad _______ didn't cry. and - so so - and so - but but - so
> 정답: so - but

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The boy is young _______ talented.
We serve salad _______ soup as a starter. so - or or - but but - or or - so
> 정답: but - or

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
It was rainy, _______ I brought my umbrella.
They have a cat _______ a rabbit. and - but or - but so - and so - but
> 정답: so - and

---

**08.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 열심히 공부했다, 그래서 원하는 학교에 들어갔다.
She studied hard, _______ she entered a good school. so but or and
> 정답: so

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 해외여행을 가고 싶었지만 갈 수 없었다.
Tom wanted to travel abroad, _______ he couldn't. and so but or
> 정답: but

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 문장을 고르시오.
(2개) She was tired, so she went to bed early.
They had a tough time, but they kept trying.
He is rich but unhappily.
He will go to college or got a job.
> 정답: She was tired, so she went to bed early., They had

---

**11.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Are Tom _______ you in the same class?
B: Yes, we are. but so and or
> 정답: and

---

**12.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Is the teacher French _______ German?
B: She is French. so or but and
> 정답: or

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He was interested in science, _______ he majored in science.
I ate cereal _______ milk in the morning. but - and or - and so - and and - but
> 정답: so - and

---

**14.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I am good at painting and singing.
He looks young, so he is old.
She was smart, but made many mistakes.
He had a headache, so he couldn't go to school.
> 정답: He looks young, so he is old.

---

**15.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I like both cats or birds.
Is he an artist or a writer?
He tried to solve the puzzle but failed to solve it.
I'm cold and hungry.
> 정답: I like both cats or birds.

---

**16.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
I like London, and I don't want to live there.
Tom was sad and cried.
Amy lives in a big house but has no car.
The juice went bad, so it tasted strange.
> 정답: I like London, and I don't want to live there.

---

**17.** 다음 중 접속사의 쓰임이 어색한 것을 고르시오.
Amy didn't eat breakfast, so she was hungry.
We went to the museum, so it was closed.
Tom or she can do this task.
Amy is good at math, English, and art.
> 정답: We went to the museum, so it was closed.

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 but, or, so 중 알맞은 접속사를 골라 쓰시오.
그는 배가 아파서, 밥을 먹을 수 없었다.
He had a stomachache, he couldn't eat anything.
> 정답: so

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 and, but, or 중 알맞은 접속사를 골라 쓰시오.
오늘은 춥고 눈이 온다.
It's cold snowy today.
> 정답: and

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 and, but, or 중 알맞은 접속사를 골라 쓰시오.
Tom은 매운 음식을 좋아하지만, 나는 그것을 좋아하지 않 는다.
Tom likes spicy food, I don't like it.
> 정답: but
